description: Table sounds du mod TCP (colonnes documentees via le D2R Data Guide).
source: Colonnes du .txt (mod TCP) ; types/descriptions du D2R Data Guide (guide/).

columns.name: Sound
columns.description: Defines the unique name ID for the sound, which is how other files can reference the sound

columns.name: Redirect
columns.description: Points the sound so the index of another sound in the data file. If this field is not empty, the game will use the redirected sound instead of this sound. This can be used when playing the game in the new graphics mode

columns.name: Channel
columns.description: Declares which channel the sound is initialized in. This can affect how different volume or sound settings handle this sound.

columns.name: FileName
columns.description: Defines the file path and name of the sound file to play

columns.name: IsLocal
columns.description: If equals 1, then this sound is considered a localized sound and will change based on the game's localization setting. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: IsMusic
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound is flagged as a music sound, which affects how music related settings handle this sound. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: IsAmbientScene
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound is flagged as an ambient scene sound, which affects how the game handles the sound when the player transitions between areas. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: IsAmbientEvent
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound is flagged as an ambient event sound, which affects how the game treats the sound when the player transitions between areas. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: IsUI
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound is flagged as a UI sound, which affects how UI related settings handle this sound. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: Volume Min
columns.description: Controls the minimum volume of the sound. Uses a range of 0 to 255

columns.name: Volume Max
columns.description: Controls the maximum volume of the sound. If both

columns.name: Pitch Min
columns.description: Controls the minimum pitch percentage of the sound

columns.name: Pitch Max
columns.description: Controls the maximum pitch percentage of the sound. If both

columns.name: Group Size
columns.description: Defines a sound Group by declaring a size value. When the sound has this value greater than 0, then this sound is declared as the group's base sound. Any link to use a sound should use the base sound, to signify that the game should use this group of sounds. This field's value controls the number of sounds indexed after base sound that should be added to the group. For example, if the sound has a "Group Size" value equal to 5, then this sound is declared as the group's base sound, and the next 4 sounds indexed after this base sound will be added to the group

columns.name: Group Weight
columns.description: Controls the chance to pick the sound when it is part of a group with other sounds. If all sounds in the group do not have a "Group Weight" value, then the group sounds will play in historical order. This value controls a weighted random chance, meaning that all related sounds have their weights added together for a total chance and each sound's weight value is rolled against that total value to determine if the sound is successfully picked. The higher this value, the more likely the sound will be picked. This is only used when the sound is part of a group ("Group Size")

columns.name: Loop
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound will replay itself after it finishes playing. If equals 0, then the sound will only play once

columns.name: Fade In
columns.description: Controls how long to gradually increase the sound's volume starting from 0 when the sound starts playing. Measured in audio game ticks, where 1 game frame is 40 audio ticks, and the game runs at 25 frames per second

columns.name: Fade Out
columns.description: Controls how long to gradually decrease the sound's volume to 0 when the sound stops playing. Measured in audio game ticks, where 1 game frame is 40 audio ticks, and the game runs at 25 frames per second

columns.name: Defer Inst
columns.description: If equals 1, then when a duplicate instance of this sound plays the game will stop that request. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: Stop Inst
columns.description: If equals 1, then when a duplicate instance of this sound plays the previous instance of the sound will stop and the new instance of the sound will play. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: Duration
columns.description: Controls the length of time to play the sound. When the sound has been playing for this length of time, then the sound will stop. If this equals 0, then ignore this functionality

columns.name: Compound
columns.description: Controls the game tick time limit for when a sound can join in playing based on the previous sound played in the Group. If equals 0, then the sound will not be compounded

columns.name: Falloff
columns.description: Defines the range of falloff for hearing the sound, based on distance. Uses a code to determine the range value presets.

columns.name: LFEMix
columns.description: Controls the percentage (out of 100) of the sound's Low-Frequency Effects channel

columns.name: 3dSpread
columns.description: Controls the 3D spread angle of the sound. This only works if the sound is considered a 3D sound (

columns.name: Priority
columns.description: Controls which if the sound should play before other sounds when too many sounds are playing at once. This value is compared to the priority value of other sounds, and the sound that has the higher priority will play first. Sounds belonging to the player will get an increased priority value of 80

columns.name: Stream
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound will be file streamed into the game when called to play. If equals 0, then the entire sound will be loaded into the game before playing

columns.name: Is2D
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound is considered a 2D sound and will not have 3D spread settings. If equals 0, then the sound is considered a 3D sound and will use the 3D spread settings

columns.name: Tracking
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound will track a unit and will update its position to follow that unit. If equals 0, then the sound will not move and will be stationary

columns.name: Solo
columns.description: If equals 1, then reduce the volume of other sounds while this sound is playing. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: Music Vol
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound's volume will be affected by the music volume in the game options menu. If equals 0, then ignore this

columns.name: HDOptOut
columns.description: If equals 1, then the sound will not play in the new graphics mode. If equals 0, then the sound will play in the new graphics mode

columns.name: Delay
columns.description: Adds a delay to the starting tick of the sound when the sound starts playing. Measured in audio game ticks, where 1 game frame is 40 audio ticks, and the game runs at 25 frames per second.
